chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 1076 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case. 1.For orders on office objection ‘A’ 2.For Hearing of main case. 22.10.2025. Petitioner Ms. Josphen present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. AG along with Dr. NiazDahar,MSCMCH larkana, Larkana, Dr.Ashfaque Ahmed Soomro, Addl. MS CMCHLarkana, ASIRabnawaz Qureshi I/c SHOPS Civil Line, Larkana. ------------ The Petitioner, serving as Senior Staff Nurse at Shaikh Zaid Women Hospital, Larkana, submits that she was appointed as a member of a committee constituted under office order dated 29.08.2025 by the Medical Superintendent, CMC Hospital, Larkana. She further states that she submitted a report concerning complaints made by private respondents, who, according to her, are harassing her. Pursuant to notice, Mr. Manzoor Ali Kalhoro, Advocate, files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No. 4 to 8, which is taken on record. He also files certain documents, which are similarly taken on record. Learned counsel submits that the private respondents have neither harassed the Petitioner nor do they intend to do so. He submits that the private respondents have filed complaints against the Petitioner before Respondent No.3. Respondent No.3, the Medical Superintendent, CMC Hospital, Larkana, is present and submits that any complaint his office receives shall be decided strictly in accordance with law. 2 In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No.3 to decide any application or complaint filed by the Petitioner or the private respondents strictly in accordance with law, after affording them an opportunity of hearing.

He submits that the private respondents have filed complaints against the Petitioner before Respondent No.3. Respondent No.3, the Medical Superintendent, CMC Hospital, Larkana, is present and submits that any complaint his office receives shall be decided strictly in accordance with law. 2 In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No.3 to decide any application or complaint filed by the Petitioner or the private respondents strictly in accordance with law, after affording them an opportunity of hearing. The constitution petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge Abid H. Qazi/**
